title: Site Tracking
siteToTrack: Which site would you like to track?
eventToTrack: Which events would you like to track?
scriptDescription:
In order to start tracking how your customers are interacting with your site, you must first implement the scripts below on your site.
In case you use our WooCommerce plugin, these scripts are already implemented within the plugin.
scriptInstruction: Copy the following lines of code and paste them in the last line before "head" element OR in to the Custom HTML tag type in your Google Tag Manager account.
scriptPurchaseInstruction: After implementing the header script, please report the following parameters using the Javascirpt function below:
scriptPurchaseIstructionForComplete: The following Javascript function should be implemented in the order confirmation page, right after the purchase is completed.
scriptPayAttention: * Pay attention, Site tracking will only work on sites with an SSL certificate
scriptPageviewImplemented: You can now set page view tracking.
purchaseInstructionTooltip: * Important! If you are collectiong and storing sensitive data, we highly recommend informing your clients
scriptInstructionEndText: After implementing this script, campaign reports will show the revenue from each campaign.
addFeatureTooltip: Want to set up tracking on your site? Talk to our sales team today at 03-5240290!

tooltip.exact: Track customers who land on a specific URL

serverResponse.missingMandatoryAction: One of the parameter is missing. Please try again

deleteDialogMessage:
Are you sure?
Clicking on "OK" will stop all tracking on your site.
NoticeLinkStatistics:
Your account is set up for Site Tracking
Removing link tracking will disable site tracking for this domain
invalidDomainAddress: Domain must be a valid domain name
